Walkscape Walkthrough

Tip of the day
Being overencumbered only slows down your activities, but doesn't affect travel.

Farsand Coast

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Namespaces

  • Page
  • Discussion

More

  • More

Page actions

  • Read
  • View source
  • History
  • Purge
Other languages:
  • English

Many rivers pierce the edge of this coast, flowing slowly into the ocean. The nearby forest is thick with trees and wildlife, only the waves that lap against the beach seem to be coming and going at a much slower pace than the rest of the world.

Farsand Coast is a location that can be found in the Grand Duchy of Trellin-Erdwise region.

Faction

Farsand Coast is a member of the following factions:

Trellin

Activities

The following activities always available at this location.

Surface swimming
Seashell searching
Crab tracking
Cut teak trees

Routes

The following routes are available at this location.

 Farsand Coast 
  Salsfirth 
550 Base Steps

Trivia


This page is updated automatically to reflect information in the current game version.
